title: Newsreel Perspectives API
description: JSON Schema for the Newsreel Perspectives API response shapes. Used for validation and documentation.

StoryType.description: How voices are distributed: split (clear opposing camps), spectrum (range of views), consensus (broad agreement), reaction (mostly one-directional response)

StorySource.description: Whether the story originated from CMS editorial picks or was auto-detected from voice data

ClusterVoice.description: A voice assigned to an argument cluster for a specific story

voiceId.description: Unique slug identifier for the voice (e.g. 'tucker-carlson')

photo.description: URL to the voice's profile photo

quote.description: Real quote from the voice's post, truncated to 200 chars. Never AI-generated.

sourceUrl.description: URL to the original post on the platform

Cluster.description: An argument cluster grouping voices with a shared position on a story

name.description: 2-4 word label describing the ARGUMENT, not ideology (e.g. 'War Critics', 'Cautious Support')

voiceCount.description: Number of voices in this cluster

Relevance.description: How many voices are directly vs tangentially related to the specific story

direct.description: Voices clearly discussing this exact story/event

related.description: Voices discussing the broader topic but not this specific story

unrelated.description: Voices not relevant at all (data quality issue)

Story.description: A story with clustered voice perspectives

headline.description: Short, specific news headline (under 12 words) generated by Claude

summary.description: One sentence (under 20 words) capturing the most interesting thing about how voices are reacting

coverUrl.description: URL to cover image/video from CMS. Empty string for voice-only stories.

storyType.description: CMS story type label (e.g. 'Breaking', 'Analysis'). Empty string for voice-only stories.

topicSlugs.description: Topic slugs from taxonomy that this story matched (e.g. ['iran-conflict', 'foreign-policy-diplomacy'])

voiceCount.description: Total number of unique voices with posts on this story

confidence.description: 1-10 rating of how confident the system is that voices are discussing the SAME story. Stories with confidence <= 3 are dropped.

clusters.description: Argument clusters sorted by voiceCount descending

VoiceProfile.description: A tracked voice/commentator profile from voices.json

platforms.description: Platforms this voice is active on

lens.description: Editorial description of the voice's perspective and approach

feeds.description: RSS/API feed URLs keyed by platform (e.g. { youtube: '...', x: '...' })

handles.description: Platform handles/usernames keyed by platform (e.g. { x: 'joerogan', instagram: 'joerogan' })

tags.description: Descriptive tags for the voice (e.g. 'libertarian-leaning', 'anti-establishment'). NOT permanent left/right labels.

SearchQuote.description: A matched quote from a voice post found during search

topic.description: Topic slug this post was categorized under

quote.description: The actual text from the post

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the original post

SearchVoice.description: A voice result from the search/lookup endpoint

argumentCluster.description: Per-story argument cluster label assigned by Claude (e.g. 'anti-war right', 'pro-intervention hawk')

lean.description: Deprecated field from older schema, may be empty

lens.description: Editorial description of the voice's perspective

topics.description: Topic slugs this voice matched on

quotes.description: Matched quotes from this voice, sorted by relevance score (best first), deduplicated

date.description: Date of the most recent topic index used

matchedTopics.description: Topic slugs matched to the headline (via Claude or keyword fallback)

voices.description: Voices found, sorted by relevance score

FractureStory.description: Backward-compatible fracture format (deprecated, use Story instead)

TopicIndex.description: Topic index mapping topic slugs to voice entries. Response from /api/topics.

description: API endpoint definitions for Newsreel Perspectives

GET /api/stories.description: Unified daily stories feed with clustered voice perspectives. Returns the most recent stories-YYYY-MM-DD.json file.

GET /api/voices.description: All tracked voice profiles from voices.json.

GET /api/lookup?q={headline}.description: Search for voices discussing a specific story. Combines topic matching (via Claude) with full-text search across the last 3 days of collected data. Runs lookup.py as a subprocess.

GET /api/topics.description: Raw topic index from the most recent collection run. Maps topic slugs to arrays of voice entries.

GET /api/fractures.description: DEPRECATED. Backward-compatible fractures format. Use /api/stories instead. Returns the most recent fractures-YYYY-MM-DD.json file.
